title: Intensely Rich Canadian Christmas Pudding Tart
description: A rich and velvety Canadian dessert featuring Christmas pudding, glaze, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients, served on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and confectioners sugar.
Add the melted butter, eggs, and vanilla extract to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough and place it in a tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake the tart crust for 20 minutes, then set it aside to cool.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and maple syrup.
Add the Christmas pudding to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Pour the Christmas pudding mixture into the tart crust and smooth the top.
Bake the tart for an additional 25 minutes, then set it aside to cool completely.
Once the tart is cool, drizzle it with additional maple syrup and serve on a cedar plank.
